# Dinheiro Web - High-Level Context

## Project Overview

**Dinheiro Web** is a personal finance management web application that empowers users to take control of their financial life. The name "Dinheiro" means "Money" in Portuguese.

## Core Purpose

Dinheiro Web serves as a comprehensive personal finance dashboard where users can:
- **Manage Financial Accounts** - Track multiple accounts across different institutions and types
- **Monitor Credit Cards** - Keep tabs on credit cards, billing cycles, and invoices
- **Record Transactions** - Log all financial transactions with details and categorization
- **Import Transactions** - Bulk import transactions from external sources
- **Analyze Finances** - View detailed monthly reports and spending analytics

## Key Features

### 1. Account Management
Manage multiple financial accounts with different types:
- Bank accounts (savings/checking)
- Investment accounts
- Credit card accounts
- Color-coded organization for easy visual identification

### 2. Credit Card Management
Track credit cards with:
- Credit limits and billing cycles
- Invoice tracking
- Transaction association with invoices
- Custom color coding

### 3. Transaction Management
Record and manage financial transactions:
- Full transaction details (amount, date, description)
- Category classification
- Account association
- Transfer tracking between accounts
- Edit and delete capabilities

### 4. Transaction Import
Bulk import functionality:
- Multiple import format support
- Automated validation
- Error handling
- Import history tracking

### 5. Category Management
Organize spending by:
- Pre-defined categories
- Custom categorization
- Category-based reporting and filtering

### 6. Monthly Reports (Relatório)
Comprehensive financial reporting:
- Monthly spending analysis
- Category-based breakdowns
- Interactive data visualization
- Customizable date ranges

### 7. Authentication & Security
Secure access:
- User login system
- JWT token-based authentication
- Protected routes
- Bearer token authorization

### 8. Color Management
Visual organization:
- Custom color assignment to accounts and cards
- Color-based visual categorization
- Consistent UI theming

## Target Users

Personal finance users who want to:
- Consolidate financial tracking across multiple accounts
- Analyze spending patterns
- Track credit card expenses
- Maintain a complete financial record
- Generate detailed financial reports

## Value Proposition

Dinheiro Web provides a centralized, user-friendly platform to:
- **Reduce Financial Complexity** - Single dashboard for all finances
- **Increase Financial Visibility** - Clear insights into spending and accounts
- **Enable Better Decision Making** - Data-driven financial analysis
- **Save Time** - Automated imports and intuitive interface
